author: y4rr
content: Audit-Fix Phase 8 APPROVE (clean). 3 BROKEN tests (#1021-#1023) strengthened with external-reference grounding: fixture-filtered flash+standard both vs PyTorch expected (#1021); LoRA pre_merge vs PyTorch-computed expected_output via regen-script extension (#1022); LayerNorm bias_grad assertion via existing fixture data (#1023). #1023 'cascade-deferred' comment was editorial — actual implementation matches PyTorch within F32_MATMUL tolerance, no divergence. Sabotage demo: expected_grad_bias[0] += 0.5 caught at line 134. No src/ changes, no new workspace deps.
